message:
feat(polyfills): add DNS resolution, IPv6, RSA-OAEP/PSS, P-384, worker_threads

Net improvements:
- DNS resolution via getaddrinfo() before socket connect
- IPv6 support with automatic AF_INET/AF_INET6 detection
- Socket write backpressure with drain events

Crypto additions:
- RSA-OAEP encryption/decryption padding (RFC 8017)
- RSA-PSS signature padding with configurable salt length
- P-384 ECDH/ECDSA curve support (key gen, sign, verify, compute secret)

Module exports:
- worker_threads module (Worker, parentPort, isMainThread, MessageChannel)
- EventEmitter.captureRejections for async error handling
